tabs.providersHint: Provider whitelist will be available after Phase 4 (cc-switch proxy discovery).
tabs.settingsHint: Settings will be available after Phase 5.

sharing.title: Subscription Sharing
sharing.description: Share your idle AI subscriptions to earn credits, or use others' subscriptions via the shared pool.
sharing.enableHint: Allow other users to use your idle subscription capacity
sharing.noModels: No shareable models found. Please start cc-switch and configure a provider first.
sharing.noModelsCcswitchUnreachable: cc-switch proxy is unreachable. Make sure cc-switch is running and listening on 127.0.0.1:15721.
sharing.noModelsCcswitchNotRunning: cc-switch proxy is not running. Start cc-switch and enable its proxy.
sharing.noModelsNoProvider: cc-switch is connected but no provider is configured. Add and enable at least one provider in cc-switch.
sharing.noModelsHint: No models detected. Make sure cc-switch is running and has a provider configured.

errors.noNode: No supplier node is available right now. Please try again later.
errors.insufficientBalance: Insufficient credits. Please top up first.
errors.taskTimeout: Request timed out (no response within 30s). Try again or pick a different model.
errors.fingerprintMismatch: Device fingerprint mismatch — this node ID is already bound to another device. Reset the binding from your cloud account.
errors.invalidToken: Authentication failed. Your token is invalid or has expired — please sign in again.
errors.nonceReplay: Request rejected as a replay. Please check that your system clock is accurate.
errors.clockSkew: Your system clock is off by more than 5 minutes. Please sync your clock.
errors.invalidSignature: Bad request signature — verify that the HMAC secret matches the cloud server.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again shortly.
errors.noExtension: No paired browser extension detected. Enter the pairing token in the extension first.
errors.webBusy: You're currently using this site. Sharing is paused (resumes after 5 minutes idle).
errors.webOffline: The corresponding web subscription is not available. Check that you're signed in to the site in your browser.
errors.badPairingToken: Bad bridge pairing token. Copy the latest token from the desktop app.
errors.serverUrlMissing: Please set the server address in the configuration first.
errors.authTokenMissing: Please set the auth token in the configuration first.
errors.nodeIdMissing: Please set the node ID in the configuration first.

calculator.title: Earnings Calculator
calculator.disclaimer: Actual earnings depend on match frequency and model mix; assumes 90% supplier rate over 30 days.

consume.title: Consume
consume.roleWarning: You are currently sharing as a supplier. Switching to consumer mode will stop sharing.
consume.roleWarningShort: Supplier mode active — switch to consume?
consume.proxyNotConfigured: Cloud server not configured. Set up connection config first.

errors.required: Server address, token, and node ID are all required

welcome.title: Welcome to CC-Share
welcome.description: Turn idle AI subscription capacity into credits, or use others' subscriptions at a better price.
welcome.bulletEarn: Supplier mode: lend out idle quota when you're not using it (90% to you)
welcome.bulletConsume: Consumer mode: route local requests to the shared pool, pay per token
welcome.bulletSafety: Local-first: sharing pauses automatically the moment you start using your tool

config.title: Connect to the cloud
config.description: Enter the server address (domain or domain:port) and your auth token. No need to specify the API path.

role.title: Pick your role
role.description: You can switch any time later from the Share panel.

supplier.title: 🚀 Supplier (earn credits)
supplier.description: Share idle API quota or web subscriptions; pauses automatically when you're using them.

consumer.title: 💰 Consumer (use models)
consumer.description: Route requests through the pool to use someone else's subscription at lower cost.

both.title: ♻️ Both
both.description: Supply and consume at once — earn while idle, spend when busy.
